messages.message: Hi , Thanks for reaching out. To help us recommend the right Pilates Reformer, could you please tell us: Are you buying for a studio, gym, or resale business? How many units are you planning to purchase? Which market/country will the machines be delivered to?
Hello! Can I get more info on this? How much for one sample
That’s great — thanks for sharing Since you’re a massage therapist, many clients in your situation usually go for a compact or standard reformer for personal or small studio use.
Do you prefer a foldable model or a regular fixed one? I can show you the best option

For one unit: – Standard reformers are usually around $400–$700 – Higher-end studio models can go up to around $900–1200 depending on the setup For your use, I’d recommend something space-efficient and easy to use, rather than a full heavy studio setup.
